basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute Of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute Of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Research Scientist - II (Non-Medical) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist - II (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Clinical Psychology/Social Work/Sociology/Psychology or similar or Post-Graduate degree in any of the above disciplines with three years post-qualification experience
qualification.details: PhD in Clinical Psychology/Social Work/Sociology/Psychology or similar or Post-Graduate degree in any of the above disciplines with three years post-qualification experience.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PhD in Clinical Psychology/Social Work/Sociology/Psychology or similar or Post-Graduate degree in any of the above disciplines with three years post-qualification experience.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government rules.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist - II (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) position is 15th July 2026. Ensure you complete the application process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Clinical Psychology, Social Work, Sociology, Psychology, or a similar field. Alternatively, a Post-Graduate degree in any of these disciplines with three years of post-qualification experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the existing Government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 67,000 per month, along with 30% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) position in this recruitment drive by AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) post will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity. The selected candidate will be appointed on a contractual basis for the duration of the project.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) position?
faq.answer: You can apply online by visiting the official website of AIIMS Delhi or by using the direct application link provided in the Important Links section. Ensure all details are accurate and upload necessary documents.
